hooks.command: bash -c 'u=${CLAUDE_CONTEXT_TOKEN_COUNT:-0}; m=${CLAUDE_CONTEXT_MAX_TOKENS:-0}; [ "$m" -gt 0 ] && [ "$u" -gt 0 ] && p=$((u*100/m)) && [ "$p" -ge 70 ] && printf "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"[CONTEXT: %d%% full (%s/%s tokens). Call get_context_usage for breakdown or /compact to reclaim space.]\"}}" "$p" "$u" "$m" || true'

allow: Bash(grep -n "pob-mcp TCP API patch\\|onFrameFuncs\\['TcpServer'\\]\\|function main:DetectUnicodeSupport" "C:/Users/charl/AppData/Roaming/Path of Building Community/Modules/Main.lua")
Bash(findstr /n "pob-mcp TCP API patch" "C:\\Users\\charl\\AppData\\Roaming\\Path of Building Community\\Modules\\Main.lua")

Bash(POB_DIRECTORY="C:\\\\Users\\\\charl\\\\OneDrive\\\\Documents\\\\Path of Building\\\\Builds" POB_LUA_ENABLED=true POB_API_TCP=true POB_API_TCP_PORT=59166 POB_FORK_PATH="C:\\\\Users\\\\charl\\\\tools\\\\PathOfBuilding\\\\src" POB_CMD="C:\\\\Users\\\\charl\\\\scoop\\\\shims\\\\luajit.exe" node build/index.js)

Bash(POB_LUA_ENABLED=true POB_API_TCP=true POB_API_TCP_PORT=59166 POB_DIRECTORY="C:\\\\Users\\\\charl\\\\OneDrive\\\\Documents\\\\Path of Building\\\\Builds" POB_FORK_PATH="C:\\\\Users\\\\charl\\\\tools\\\\PathOfBuilding\\\\src" POB_CMD="C:\\\\Users\\\\charl\\\\scoop\\\\shims\\\\luajit.exe" node build/index.js)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "Code" | ForEach-Object { $id = $_.Id; Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.ParentProcessId -eq $id -and $_.Name -eq "node.exe" } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine })
PowerShell(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessId -eq 44748 } | Select-Object Name, CommandLine)

PowerShell(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessId -eq 48068 } | Select-Object Name, CommandLine; Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.ParentProcessId -eq 48068 } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine)

PowerShell(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessId -eq 44748 -or $_.ProcessId -eq 48068 -or $_.ParentProcessId -eq 44748 -or $_.ParentProcessId -eq 48068 } | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, Name, CommandLine)
